mapper.select: SELECT id, name, biz_type, printer_config_id, content, paper_width, status, is_default, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM sys_feie_print_template WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND printer_config_id = #{printerConfigId} AND is_default = 1 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
